mapper.insert: insert into user(username, password, nickname, avatar, role, email, phone, status, create_time) values(#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{role}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select count(*) from user where update_time >= #{since}
select count(*) from user where date(create_time) = date(#{date})
select count(*) from user where create_time between #{startDate} and #{endDate}
select count(*) from user where role = #{role}
select * from user order by create_time desc

select * from user where user_id in
#{userId}
